items.title: Port first DCG CI/CD expansion beyond current builtin family
items.notes: Current slice covers GitHub, GitLab runner/variables, Jenkins delete-job, and CircleCI remove-secret only.

items.title: Add fail-closed coverage for placeholder-driven xargs templates
items.notes: Current extraction handles high-confidence `xargs ... sh -c` templates without placeholders; placeholder-based forms should get explicit fixture coverage.

items.title: Audit and update stale rows in specs/rule-landscape.md
items.notes: Safe build-dir allowlist and container-escape coverage should no longer be listed as missing.
